xmlns:a="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/SolarWinds.Reporting.Models.Presentation"/><PropertyName>LastPolled</PropertyName><RefId>ab7aa84d-0429-0c56-1184-ff9793dd9a8d</RefId><Summary><Calculation>NotSpecified</Calculation><CellStyle i:nil="true" xmlns:a="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/SolarWinds.Reporting.Models.Styles"/></Summary><TransformId/><ValidRange>NotSpecified</ValidRange></TableColumn></Columns><DefaultStyle i:nil="true" xmlns:a="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/SolarWinds.Reporting.Models.Styles"/><Filter xmlns:a="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/SolarWinds.Reporting.Models.Selection"><a:Expression i:nil="true"/><a:Limit><a:Count i:nil="true"/><a:Mode>ShowAll</a:Mode><a:OrionServerIDsToIgnore i:nil="true"/><a:Percentage i:nil="true"/></a:Limit></Filter><Indents i:nil="true"/><Sorts xmlns:a="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/SolarWinds.Reporting.Models.Selection"><a:SortEntry><a:Direction>Ascending</a:Direction><a:QFieldRefID>b14997b2-fe66-4440-73cd-884fc122ae9c</a:QFieldRefID></a:SortEntry></Sorts><SummarizeMode>NoDataSummarization</SummarizeMode><TimeField i:nil="true" xmlns:a="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/SolarWinds.Reporting.Models.Selection"/></TableConfiguration>" /><property name = "datasource" value="<DataSource xmlns:i="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/SolarWinds.Reporting.Models.Selection">_x000D_linebreak <CommandText>select distinct _x000D_linebreakcp.GroupName as [c1]_x000D_linebreak, concat('ampersandlt;img src="/orion/images/OidPicker/Group.gif"ampersandgt; UNDP Group ',cp.Groupname) as Name_x000D_linebreak, '' as [Status]_x000D_linebreak, NULL as LastPolled_x000D_linebreak_x000D_linebreakfrom orion.npm.custompollers cp _x000D_linebreakjoin orion.npm.CustomPollerAssignment cpa on cpa.CustomPollerID=cp.CustomPollerID and cpa.NodeID = ${nodeid}_x000D_linebreak_x000D_linebreakunion all _x000D_linebreak(_x000D_linebreakselect _x000D_linebreakconcat(cp.GroupName, ' - ',cpa.CustomPollerName) as [c1] _x000D_linebreak, concat('ampersandlt;img src="/Orion/images/device_poller.png"ampersandgt; ', cpa.CustomPollerName) as Name_x000D_linebreak, case _x000D_linebreakwhen cpa.status = 0 then 'Polling Error'_x000D_linebreakwhen cp.SNMPGetType = 'GetSubTree' then 'Table values below' _x000D_linebreakelse concat('ampersandlt;img src="/Orion/images/StatusIcons/Small-',si.StatusName,'.gif"ampersandgt; ', cps.Status) _x000D_linebreakend as [Status]_x000D_linebreak, last.LastPolled_x000D_linebreak_x000D_linebreakfrom orion.npm.custompollers cp _x000D_linebreakjoin orion.npm.CustomPollerAssignment cpa on cpa.CustomPollerID=cp.CustomPollerID and cpa.NodeID = ${nodeid}_x000D_linebreakjoin orion.StatusInfo si on si.StatusId= cpa.Status_x000D_linebreakleft join_x000D_linebreak(SELECT_x000D_linebreakmax(DateTime) as Lastpolled_x000D_linebreak, CustomPollerAssignmentID, min(RowID) as minrow_x000D_linebreakFROM Orion.NPM.CustomPollerStatistics cps_x000D_linebreakwhere cps.CustomPollerAssignment.NodeID = ${nodeid}_x000D_linebreak_x000D_linebreakgroup by CustomPollerAssignmentID) last on cpa.CustomPollerAssignmentID=last.custompollerassignmentid_x000D_linebreakleft join orion.npm.CustomPollerStatistics cps on cps.CustomPollerAssignmentID = cpa.CustomPollerAssignmentID and last.minrow=cps.RowID and last.lastpolled=cps.DateTime_x000D_linebreak_x000D_linebreak )_x000D_linebreakunion all (_x000D_linebreakselect _x000D_linebreakconcat(cp.GroupName, ' - ',cpa.CustomPollerName, ' - ', cpst.RowID) as [c1] _x000D_linebreak, concat(' - ampersandlt;img src="/Orion/images/TopologyItems/RArrow2.png"ampersandgt; - ',cpst.RowLabel) as Name_x000D_linebreak, concat('ampersandlt;img src="/Orion/images/StatusIcons/Small-',si.statusname,'.gif"ampersandgt; ', cpst.status) as [Status]_x000D_linebreak, NULL as LastPolled_x000D_linebreak_x000D_linebreakfrom orion.npm.custompollers cp _x000D_linebreakjoin orion.npm.CustomPollerAssignment cpa on cpa.CustomPollerID=cp.CustomPollerID and cpa.NodeID = ${nodeid}_x000D_linebreakjoin orion.npm.CustomPollerStatusOnNodeTabular cpst on cpst.CustomPollerAssignmentID = cpa.CustomPollerAssignmentID_x000D_linebreakjoin orion.StatusInfo si on si.StatusId=cpst.RowStatus_x000D_linebreak)</CommandText>_x000D_linebreak <DynamicSelectionType>Undefined</DynamicSelectionType>_x000D_linebreak <EntityUri xmlns:d2p1="http://schemas.microsoft.com/2003/10/Serialization/Arrays" />_x000D_linebreak <Filter i:nil="true" />_x000D_linebreak <MasterEntity>Orion.Nodes</MasterEntity>_x000D_linebreak <Name>Current Node</Name>_x000D_linebreak <NetObjectId>N:34849</NetObjectId>_x000D_linebreak <RefId>aaeb45a9-7fe5-46a4-81e0-1aa480207e5e</RefId>_x000D_linebreak <Type>CustomSWQL</Type>_x000D_linebreak</DataSource>" /><property name = "defaulttitle" value="Custom Table" /><property name = "dynamicdatasource" value="False" /><property name = "subtitle" value="" /><property name = "timeframe" value="<TimeFrame xmlns:i="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/SolarWinds.Reporting.Models.Timing">_x000D_linebreak <DisplayName>Today</DisplayName>_x000D_linebreak <IsStatic>false</IsStatic>_x000D_linebreak <RefId>7ced49d3-1caf-4533-a467-40ed5baf5ff7</RefId>_x000D_linebreak <Relative>_x000D_linebreak <NamedTimeFrame>Today</NamedTimeFrame>_x000D_linebreak <Unit>NotSpecified</Unit>_x000D_linebreak <UnitCount>0</UnitCount>_x000D_linebreak </Relative>_x000D_linebreak <Static i:nil="true" />_x000D_linebreak</TimeFrame>" /><property name = "title" value="Universal Poller Status" /></properties></resource>
